points.label: Weight（controller display weight）
points.description: 4 bytes, signed number (display weight). Note: When the weight overflows, the Controller displays OFL, the weight value is fixed and returns 0xFFFFFFFF

points.label: Flowrate
points.description: Read only：Unit and decimal are read in address 40010 and address 40011

points.label: Flowrate decimal
points.description: Read only：0：0 bit；1：1 bit；2：2 bit； 3：3 bit；4：4 bit

points.label: Calibrate Weight
points.description: When write is 1, the current weight is regarded as zero, and write is allowed only when the weight of the platform is stable. Read returns absolute millivolts

points.label: Write the current actual weight, controller according to the current millivolt and write weight calibration gain; Read returns the current weight millivolt, eg if the current gain weight millivolt is negative, then the gain cannot be calibrated.
points.description: Write the current actual weight, controller according to the current millivolt and write weight calibration gain; Read returns the current weight millivolt, eg if the current gain weight millivolt is negative, then the gain cannot be calibrated.

points.label: Theoretical Calibration
points.description: Write the millivolt value to be calibrated to zero; Read returns the current zero millivolt

points.label: Write enters the number of millivolts corresponding to the gain weight, and controller stores it temporarily; Read returns the relative millivolt
points.description: Write enters the number of millivolts corresponding to the gain weight, and controller stores it temporarily; Read returns the relative millivolt

points.label: The weight value corresponding to write and gain millivolt must be written before writing this value. The gain millivolt of None weight must be written before writing this register. Read returns the value of write
points.description: The weight value corresponding to write and gain millivolt must be written before writing this value. The gain millivolt of None weight must be written before writing this register. Read returns the value of write

points.label: Target
points.description: write value must be smaller than or equal to Capacity

points.label: OVER
points.description: write value must be smaller than or equal to Capacity

points.label: Manually clear the last in&outACUM ON OFF before start
start/finish I/O Functiontest
points.description: Write 1 enter I/O Functiontest，write 0 OFF I/O Functiontest

points.label: I/O Function self defined
points.description: Write: Write The function value of the I/O Function. Eg To define IN2 as I3, write 3 in register IN2. Read: Returns the current custom state of the I/O Function

points.label: Initial value: 8-E-1 (8bitdatabit-1bit stop bit); 1: 8-N-1 2:8-E-1 3:7-N-1 4:7-E -1 is optional.
points.description: Initial value: 8-E-1 (8bitdatabit-1bit stop bit); 1: 8-N-1 2:8-E-1 3:7-N-1 4:7-E -1 is optional.

points.label:
MODBUS dual word register storage order selection. Default: 0 (high before low after) Range: 0-1 (0: high word before low word after; 1: The
word "low" is in front of the
word "high" is behind)
points.description:
MODBUS dual word register storage order selection. Default: 0 (high before low after) Range: 0-1 (0: high word before low word after; 1: The
word "low" is in front of the
word "high" is behind)

points.label: Initial value: 8-E-1 (8bitdatabit-1bit stop bit); 1: 8-N-1 2:8-E-1 3:7-N-1 4:7-E -1 is optional.
points.description: Initial value: 8-E-1 (8bitdatabit-1bit stop bit); 1: 8-N-1 2:8-E-1 3:7-N-1 4:7-E -1 is optional.

points.label: MODBUS dual word register storage order selection. Default: 0 (high-low ) Range: 0-1 (0: high-low; 1: The word "low" is in front of the word "high" is behind)
points.description: MODBUS dual word register storage order selection. Default: 0 (high-low ) Range: 0-1 (0: high-low; 1: The word "low" is in front of the word "high" is behind)

points.label: User ACUM print
points.description: Write 0-9:print corresponding 0- 9userACUM Write 101: print all userACUM（Do not print users whose ACUMdata is 0） Write 100 : print current userACUM

points.label: Recipe ACUM report print
points.description: write1-20：print corresponding recipe ACUM； write101 ：print all recipe ACUM （Do not print a recipe with ACUM data 0）； write100 ：print current recipe ACUM

points.label: DISC Gate Close Limit Signal Type
points.description: 0：Feed Gate Closed-Signal ON；1： Feed Gate Closed-Signal OFF

points.label: DISC Gate Drive Mode
points.description: 0：air drive；1：motor drive single Limit ； 2：motor drive Double Limit；3：Motor Rotation (single Limit)

points.label: DISC Gate Close Limit Signal Type
points.description: 0：DISC Gate Closed-Signal ON；1： DISC Gate Closed-Signal OFF

points.label: DISC Limit In Run Check ON/OFF
Reset Completed
points.description: Write 8800 Reset All Para(Include Cal) write 8801 Reset All Para(Exclude Cal) Write 8802 Reset Recipe Para. write 8803 Reset weight Para. Write 8804 Reset Motor Para. write 8805 Reset calibration Para. Write 8806 Reset I/O Function Para. Write 8807 Reset COM Para

points.label: Para Backup
points.description: Write 8800 para backup,write8801 recovery backup，write8802 delet backup

points.label: Clear ACUM
points.description: write0 clear ACUM data write1only clear ACUM data，read 0

points.label: Clear recipe ACUM
points.description: Write 1-20 clear ACUM data write 100 clear current recipe ACUM write 101clear all recipe ACUM Read 0

points.label: Clear user ACUM
points.description: Write 0-9 clear userACUM Write 100 clear current user ACUMdata Write 101 clear all userACUM data Read 0

points.label: Trigger Type
points.description: Initial value：0；range：0~64 Optional customization trigger input, fix I/O Module input 1~12, I/O Module output define, weight value trigger

points.label: Trigger Function Input
points.description: Initial value：0；range：0~12 Select the signal corresponding to the I/O Module input port 0~12, input port-0 stands for do not define this function

points.label: Trigger Function Output
points.description: Initial value：0；range：0~16 Select the signal corresponding to the I/O Module input port 0~16, input port-0 stands for do not define this function.

bits.label: Calibration Fail, Loadcell Input High（None Weight zero voltage input greater than 15625）
Calibration Fail, Loadcell Input Low（None Weight zero voltage input is less than 2）
Calibration Fail, Weight Over（None Weight gain voltage input greater than 15625）
Calibration Fail, Weight Under（Input weight value when the relative voltage is negative）
Calibration Fail, Weight Value Error（None Weight gain Weight Write The value is 0 or greater than Capacity）
Calibration Fail, Over Resolution（Too high calibration resolution）

Calibration Fail, No Gain Voltage Record（The relative Gain Voltage is not calibrated when the weight is calibrated
with None weight）
